_comment: Decision rules for the refresh strategy engine

rules.name: Keyword Provided + Low Traffic
rules.description: Article with a provided target keyword but little traffic - analyse competitor gaps and propose a refresh
rules.alert_message: Article awaiting SEO optimisation based on TOP 3 competitor analysis.

rules.name: Insufficient GSC Data
rules.description: Not enough data for a reliable analysis - new domain or short history
rules.alert_message: Insufficient data for a refresh decision. Wait for more traffic or check indexing.

rules.name: URL Absent from the Google Index
rules.description: Page crawled but absent from the index - requires an E-E-A-T rewrite
rules.alert_message: URL crawled but not indexed - FULL REFRESH with E-E-A-T reinforcement required

rules.name: Indexing Errors Detected
rules.description: Page indexed but with mobile/structured data errors
rules.alert_message: Mobile or structured data errors detected - structure fix required

rules.name: URL Discovered but Not Crawled
rules.description: URL known to Google but never crawled
rules.alert_message: URL discovered but not crawled - check quality and internal linking

rules.name: Low CTR with High Impressions
rules.description: The article is visible but generates no clicks - optimise title/meta

rules.name: Semantic Shift Detected
rules.description: The main keyword is losing positions while variants are rising
rules.special_instructions: Reinforce E-E-A-T signals, reorient towards the performing variants

rules.name: Severe Cannibalization
rules.description: Another URL of the same site performs better on the same keyword

rules.name: Format Not Suited to the SERP
rules.description: The current format (e.g. Guide) does not match the dominant SERP format (e.g. Listicle)

format_mappings.guide_to_listicle: Restructure as a numbered list with a short intro
format_mappings.article_to_faq: Add a dominant FAQ section, restructure as Q&A
format_mappings.text_to_comparison: Add a comparison table, comparative structure

rules.name: Stale Content (Moderate)
rules.description: Content older than 12 months without a substantial update

rules.name: Stale Content (Critical)
rules.description: Content older than 18 months or with badly outdated data

rules.name: Significant Position Drop
rules.description: Loss of more than 10 positions on the main keyword

rules.name: Severe Traffic Drop
rules.description: Loss of more than 50% of traffic over 3 months

rules.name: Deindexed Page
rules.description: The page no longer appears in the Google index

rules.name: No Action Needed
rules.description: The article performs well and is up to date

TITLE_OPTIMIZATION.description: Optimisation of the H1 title and meta description only
guidelines: Analyse the titles of the top 3 SERP results
Add the year if relevant
Use power words to improve CTR
Keep the title under 60 characters

SEMANTIC_REORIENTATION.description: Semantic reorientation towards the performing keyword variants
guidelines: Identify the rising keyword variants
Restructure the content around these variants
Reinforce E-E-A-T signals
Add proof of expertise

FORMAT_ADAPTATION.description: Adaptation of the article format to the dominant SERP format
guidelines: Identify the dominant format on the SERP
Restructure without losing valuable content
Adapt visual elements (lists, tables)
Preserve the assets (images, links)

PARTIAL_REFRESH.description: Partial refresh of the outdated elements
guidelines: Update only the outdated data
Keep the structure and the style
Add recent sources (2025-2026)
Refresh the FAQ section with the current PAA

SUGGEST_301.description: Suggestion of a 301 redirect to a better-performing URL

LONG_TAIL_SPECIALIZATION.description: Specialization on a long-tail query to avoid cannibalization
guidelines: Identify a unique long-tail variant
Refocus the content on this variant
Clearly differentiate from the other URL
Adjust the internal linking

CONTENT_GAP_ANALYSIS.description: Content gap analysis vs TOP 3 competitors and refresh proposal
guidelines: Analyse the TOP 3 competitors for the provided keyword
Identify what is missing: images, tables, sections, FAQ, pricing, reviews
Propose specific additions based on SERP features (PAA, local pack, videos, etc)
Write content targeting the 3 detected intents
Add reinforced E-E-A-T via sources and disclaimers

sheet_update.value: Waiting for GSC/DataForSEO data - check GSC property and indexing

MEDIUM.description: Moderate cannibalization - monitoring and planned action
